case_title: NATIONAL COLLEGIATE STUDENT LOAN TRUST 2007-1 VS. NAIDE SILVA ET AL

docket_entries.description: ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR NOV-03-2020 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF(S) OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) OF SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 100153297), PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF NATIONAL COLLEGIATE STUDENT LOAN TRUST 2007-1 A DELAWARE STATUTORY TRUST(S) SERVED JUN-20-2021, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT SILVA, NAIDE
STIPULATION SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 100115205) FILED BY SILVA, NAIDE
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF FEB-23-2021 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF NATIONAL COLLEGIATE STUDENT LOAN TRUST 2007-1 A DELAWARE STATUTORY TRUST(S) AS TO DEFENDANT SILVA, NAIDE DOES 1 TO 15 INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  AUG-03-2020
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE (TRANSACTION ID # 100117190)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR NOV-03-2020 CONTINUED TO FEB-23-2021 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
